description: This scenario verifies the chatbot's ability to support and respond in multiple languages.
steps: Log in using any available OAuth option.
Initiate a conversation by entering a query in English.
Observe the chatbot's response in English.
Switch language to Spanish using the language selection option.
Verify the chatbot responds correctly in Spanish.
Switch to a third language, such as French.
Ensure the chatbot responds in French.
Check if language switching retains conversation history.
expected_results: Chatbot responds accurately in all selected languages.
Language switch reflects immediately without page reload.
Conversation history is preserved across language switches.
edge_cases: Loss of conversation history on language switch.
Incorrect language detected for entered query.
Failure to switch back to default language.
data_requirements: User account with multilingual support enabled.
dependencies: User account pre-setup with multilingual preferences.
api_interactions: Chatbot interaction API for each language
performance_metrics: Chatbot response time in different languages.
accessibility_requirements: Ensure language selection options are accessible via keyboard.
Verify screen reader compatibility across languages.
Check for correct language tags in HTML for each language.
